title: lotus creticus var. patens
intro: Lotus creticus var. patens is a variant of the Lotus creticus plant, also known as the sea lotus or lotus tree, a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Lotus creticus var. patens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, and it is also used in traditional Greek medicine.
